name: Cashew Truffles
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Semisweet or milk chocolate Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the semisweet chocolate in a heavy 2-quart saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until melted. Remove from heat.
2. Stir in the margarine.
3. Stir in the whipping cream and cashews. Refrigerate for 10 to 15 minutes, stirring frequently, just until thick enough to hold a shape.
4. Drop mixture by teaspoonfuls onto aluminum foil-covered cookie sheet. Shape into balls. If the mixture is too sticky, refrigerate until firm enough to shape.
5. Freeze truffles for 30 minutes.
6. Heat the shortening and chocolate chips over very low heat, stirring constantly until melted and smooth. Remove from heat.
7. Dip truffles one at a time into the chocolate. Place on aluminum foil-covered cookie sheet.
8. Immediately sprinkle some of the truffles with finely chopped nuts if desired.
9. Refrigerate truffles for about 10 minutes or until coating is set.
10. Drizzle some of the truffles with a mixture of 1/4 cup powdered sugar and 1/2 teaspoon milk if desired. Refrigerate just until set.
11. Serve at room temperature. Store truffles in an airtight container.
